/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -flto -Wl,--gc-sections -shared -Wl,-soname,libcss.so.1 -o libcss.so.1 CMakeFiles/css.dir/src/stylesheet.c.o CMakeFiles/css.dir/src/charset/detect.c.o
